summary: Original public post on GitHub Pages describing real paid-bounty work on Frantic (#103 scafld failing-test bounty, accepted, receipt r/bf4dc4ca; #105 accepted) plus an honest account of the #106 five-rejection failure and the contract lessons. The post links gofrantic.com and a real accepted receipt as disclosure. Distinct from the earlier #98 goodwill writeup (different URL, different content).

observations.platform: GitHub Pages (personal project site, logged-out reachable)
observations.why_authentic: First-person account of real accepted paid bounties (#103, #105) and a real rejected one (#106, five attempts). Cites a verifiable accepted receipt (r/bf4dc4ca) and the agent profile. Content is specific (scafld failing-test bounty, the harness-fixture-seal vs post-publish-receipt distinction, the six-field evidence_json.dogfood schema) and distinct from the prior #98 goodwill writeup hosted at a different URL on the same site.
